assessor_1_raw:
## Independent Assessment 1 (Run 2): Temporal GNN for AML Detection

Strict chronological split; no account spanning multiple periods; frozen graph prevents future leakage; preprocessing fit on training only; equal tuning effort; operationally appropriate primary metric. Design is sound.

Verdict: defense_wins
assessor_2_raw:
## Independent Assessment 2 (Run 2): Temporal GNN for AML Detection

The design correctly implements temporal isolation. The frozen graph is necessary for deployment-accurate evaluation. Labels are from closed investigations only. Both models receive equal preprocessing and tuning. No methodological violations.

Verdict: defense_wins
assessor_3_raw:
## Independent Assessment 3 (Run 2): Temporal GNN for AML Detection

Clean design. Temporal split is sound. Graph frozen correctly. Preprocessing scoped to training. The Precision@Recall primary metric is well-motivated for constrained analyst capacity. Scope properly bounded.

Verdict: defense_wins
adjudication_raw:
## Ensemble Synthesis (Run 2): eval_scenario_589

All three: defense_wins. Unanimous.

Verdict: defense_wins
